zh.Leverington, Cambridgeshire, England: 英國坎布利其爾列福林頓
zh.lifeSummary: Richard Everard Sr.是Thomas Everard的兒子，於1340年出生在英國坎布利其爾列福林頓。他至少有1個兒子。他去世於1390年在他的家鄉享年50歲。

zh-hans.Leverington, Cambridgeshire, England: 英国坎布利其爾列福林頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Richard Everard Sr.是Thomas Everard的儿子，于1340年出生在英国坎布利其爾列福林頓。他至少有1个儿子。他去世于1390年在他的家乡享年50岁。

nameMeanings.name: Everard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Everett  .
French (northern), Walloon, and Dutch: variant of French and Walloon   Evrard  , Dutch   Everhard  .
Americanized form of German   Eberhardt   or   Everhardt  .

variants.name: Everett
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from the Middle English personal names Everard and Everet. These might occasionally be from the Old English form of the name, Eoforheard (from eofor ‘boar’ + heard ‘hardy, brave’), but many bearers of this name were undoubtedly Normans, who took it from the cognate ancient Germanic Eburhard, Everhard.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

variants.name: Rikert

His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: Richard Everard Sr. was born in 1340, in Leverington, Cambridgeshire, England as the son of Thomas Everard. He had at least 1 son. He died in 1390, in his hometown, at the age of 50.

fr.lifeSummary: Richard Everard Sr. est né en 1340, à Leverington, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, fils de Thomas Everard. Il a eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1390, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 50 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Richard Everard Sr. wurde 1340 in Leverington, Cambridgeshire, England, als Sohn von Thomas Everard geboren. Er hatte mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1390 im Alter von 50 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Richard Everard Sr. è nato il nel 1340 nel Leverington, Cambridgeshire, England come figlio di Thomas Everard. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1390, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 50 anni.

ja.Leverington, Cambridgeshire, England: イギリスカンブリジェシュアイアレバーイントン
ja.lifeSummary: Richard Everard Sr.は1340年にイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアレバーイントンでThomas Everardの息子として生まれた。彼は少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1390年に故郷で50歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Everard Sr.(은)는 1340년 영국 캄브리지실르 레버링턴에서 Thomas Everard의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1390년 그의 고향에서 50세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Richard Everard Sr. nasceu em 1340, em Leverington, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra filho de Thomas Everard. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 1390, em sua cidade natal, com 50 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Richard Everard Sr. родился в 1340 г. в местности ливирингтон, камбриджешир, Англия. Его отца звали Thomas Everard. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1390 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 50 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Richard Everard Sr. nació en 1340, en Leverington, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra como hijo de Thomas Everard. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1390, en su pueblo, a la edad de 50 años.
